summary: Backend and frontend mobile-first flows were tested for auth, role-based tabs, courses, enrollments, and admin overview. All requested functional paths passed in this run.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: useNativeDriver not supported in current runtime, fallback to JS animation

action_items: Optional hardening: enforce JWT_SECRET_KEY via environment (remove insecure fallback default)
Optional UX hardening: investigate Animated useNativeDriver warning for web runtime if needed
critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py uses default JWT secret fallback (SECRET_KEY env optional), which is unsafe for production
Expo tunnel logs show intermittent ngrok tunnel failures; app eventually recovered and tests passed
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed users/courses via API and UI during test execution; no delete endpoints available for cleanup.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use /app/backend/tests/test_cursify_api.py as regression base. Public preview URL was reachable and role-based tab rendering validated for student/admin logins.
rca_of_issue: Previous backend logs showed a historical create_course 500 caused by MongoDB _id leaking into response validation. Current code path (insert_one(course_doc.copy()) and response from original dict) is stable and tests pass.
